name: Tamura's Fine Wine & Liquors
tagline: Walk into a wine shop, walk out with the best poke in Kailua — trust the process.
mustOrder: garlic shrimp poke (hard to find elsewhere)
parking: Ample parking at Aikahi Park Shopping Center
talkStory: The Tamura family started as a legit wine/liquor store, then added a poke counter that became equally famous. You can taste before buying. The move: grab a pound of poke + a bottle of wine, drive to Kailua Beach or Lanikai for sunset. Best selection before 1pm.
